description_long: This guard rail consists of two horizontal, solid black panels supported by four vertical posts at the corners. The panels are smooth and opaque, likely made of metal, and are joined by visible brackets or welds at the posts. The posts extend slightly above and below the panels, with small protruding tabs on the sides, suggesting mounting or connection points. The overall construction is robust and industrial, suitable for use along roads, parking lots, or urban walkways to prevent vehicles or pedestrians from crossing. The ends of the rail are blunt and squared off, with no visible flaring or energy-absorbing features. The surface is uniform in color and finish, with no visible reflective markings or decorative elements.
description: A solid black, double-panel metal guard rail with four vertical posts and blunt ends, designed for robust urban or roadside protection.
description_view_0: Front view showing two horizontal black panels and four vertical posts with side tabs.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the panels and posts, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the solid panels and post structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow edge of the panels and posts.
